front.title: A Well-Known URI for Discovery of Application-Specific Trust Anchors

abstract.t: This document defines the "company-certs" well-known URI in accordance with Request for Comments (RFC) 8615. The URI provides a JSON metadata document that allows an organization to publish application-specific trust anchors and related revocation information for use by consuming applications. The mechanism is intended for scoped trust bootstrapping, such as S/MIME, mutual TLS, or other application-local trust decisions, without modifying the global operating system trust store.
